name: OnAREthProcessTxMessage
title: OnAREthProcessTxMessage
description: This callback function is called whenever the IL wants to send a SOME/IP message.
The return value of this callback determines if the message should be send or if it should be blocked. Furthermore the message may be modified before the IL sends the message.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the to be sent message that triggered the callback.

return: The message will be send if the callback returns 1.Otherwise the message has been filtered by the callback.
